calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-14-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record (525)
10:51am: Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Tan, Hui Pei, appears in Pro Per with a certified Cantonese Interpreter, Nora Uyeda. Respondent, Liang, Tian M. appears in Pro Per with an uncertified Cantonese Interpreter, Joanne Leung.
Ms. Uyeda objects to Ms. Leung acting as interpreter for Mr. Liang, claiming she is a relative and may be biased. Judge Myles instructs Ms. Leung of what is expected of an interpreter, and that Ms. Uyeda will be appointed as the official interpreter. He explains that this will not preclued Ms. Leung from conferring or translating for Mr. Liang.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative, through the interpreter.
EXHRA Undated statement from Mr. Tan re 4/24/07 incident
EXHA1 Folder of Medical records
EXHA2 2nd folder of Medical records.
11:40am
Matter is submitted, evdidence is retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-13-2007 Judgment Entered
